era_resolution: Colonial rule and division of the continent among European powers
modern_resolution: Adoption of advanced socio-economic models focusing on inclusive growth, empowerment of local communities, and strategic international cooperation

biblical_tie.context: Restoring the foundations and rebuilding the age-old ruins to make a new path for the people

protocol: UESP Protocol 1121: Implementing Socio-Economic Rebalancing through Community Empowerment, Strategic Partnerships, and Sustainable Development to address systemic disparities
